sql_array: CREATE TABLE mail_messages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, subject VARCHAR(255), body TEXT, received TIMESTAMP, flags VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO mail_messages (id, subject, body, received, flags) VALUES (1, 'Test Email', 'This is a test', '2023-10-01 12:00:00', 'unread');
INSERT INTO mail_messages (id, subject, body, received, flags) VALUES (2, 'Another Email', NULL, '2023-10-02 12:00:00', 'read');
INSERT INTO mail_messages (id, subject, body, received, flags) VALUES (3, 'Empty Body', '', '2023-10-02 12:05:00', 'unread');
SELECT id, subject FROM mail_messages WHERE imap_get(body) IS NOT NULL AND received > '2023-10-01 00:00:00';
SELECT id, subject FROM mail_messages WHERE imap_get(body) IS NOT NULL AND (flags = 'unread' OR flags IS NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mail_messages WHERE imap_get(body) IS NOT NULL AND (received > '2023-10-01 12:00:00' OR received IS NULL);
SELECT id, subject FROM mail_messages WHERE imap_get(body) IS NOT NULL AND (flags > 'read' AND subject > 'Test Email');

SELECT id, subject FROM mail_messages WHERE imap_get(body) IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mail_messages m2 WHERE m2.id = mail_messages.id AND flags = 'unread' AND imap_get(m2.body) IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, subject, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY flags) as flag_count FROM mail_messages WHERE imap_get(body) IS NOT NULL AND received > '2023-10-01 00:00:00' HAVING flag_count > 1;
SELECT id FROM mail_messages WHERE imap_get(body) IS NOT NULL AND (0 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mail_messages m3 WHERE m3.received <= mail_messages.received) OR subject IS NULL);
